data.name: Settings.Edit.PianoKeyBehavior.Desc
data.value: Sound output when pressing piano keys

data.name: Settings.Edit.SoundFontPath.NotLoaded
data.value: ⚠ Not loaded - Please select a valid SF2 file

data.name: Settings.Edit.PlaybackRefreshRate.Desc
data.value: UI refresh frequency during playback. Higher values are smoother but use more CPU.

data.name: Settings.Edit.ShowPortrait.Desc
data.value: Display singer portrait on the piano roll.

data.name: Settings.Edit.UndoLimit.Desc
data.value: Maximum number of undo history steps kept in memory.

data.name: Settings.Edit.AutoSave.Desc
data.value: Time interval for auto-saving project while editing.

data.name: Settings.Edit.StopButtonBehavior.Desc
data.value: Configure what happens when you press the stop button during and after playback.

data.name: Settings.Render.AcousticSteps.Desc
data.value: Controls acoustic model inference quality. Higher values yield better quality but slower speed (recommended: 5-20)

data.name: Settings.Render.PreRender.Desc
data.value: Renders audio ahead of time in the background for smoother playback

data.name: Settings.Render.ThreadCount.Desc
data.value: Number of simultaneous render threads. Adjust based on CPU cores (recommended: 2-4)

data.name: Settings.Render.OnnxRunner.Desc
data.value: Select ONNX Runtime execution backend for machine learning models.

data.name: Settings.Render.OnnxRunner.NnapiWarning
data.value: Some devices do not support hardware acceleration. Choosing NNAPI may cause crashes.

data.name: Settings.Render.AudioBackend.Desc
data.value: Select audio output backend. Auto will choose the best backend for the platform

data.name: Settings.Render.AudioBackend.RestartRequired
data.value: Changing audio backend requires restarting the app

data.name: Settings.File.AdditionalSingerPath.Desc
data.value: Specify an additional directory to search for singers.

data.name: Settings.File.RenderCache.Desc
data.value: Deletes cached render files stored in app data.

data.name: Settings.Appearance.Theme.Desc
data.value: Choose light, dark, or follow system theme.

data.name: Settings.Appearance.ThemeColor.Desc
data.value: Follow system accent color or choose a custom seed color.

data.name: Settings.Appearance.ThemeColor.FallbackToSystem
data.value: Invalid custom color, fallback to system accent.

data.name: Settings.Appearance.ThemeColor.SystemUnavailable
data.value: System accent is unavailable, using fallback color.

data.name: FilePicker.AccessDenied
data.value: Access to this folder is denied

data.name: FilePicker.OverwriteWarning
data.value: A file with the same name already exists in this folder and will be overwritten.

data.name: SingerDetail.DeleteWarning
data.value: Deleting this singer will permanently remove all related files. This action cannot be undone.

data.name: PianoRoll.Toast.NotePropertiesNotImpl
data.value: Note properties editor not implemented yet

data.name: PianoRoll.Toast.ControlPointNotFound
data.value: No control point list found for insertion

data.name: DependencyManager.Toast.InstallFromFileNotImpl
data.value: Install from file not implemented yet

data.name: Options.DependencyManager.Desc
data.value: Install and manage voice banks, phonemes, and dependencies

data.name: Options.ExportLog.Desc
data.value: Export and share logs for troubleshooting

data.name: About.Contribute.Desc
data.value: Report Bugs | Feature Requests | Contribute Code

data.name: About.Toast.OpenLinkNotImpl
data.value: Open external link not implemented yet

data.name: ExportAudioPopup.PathPlaceholder
data.value: Please select an output .wav file path.

data.name: ExportAudioPopup.Mode.TracksHint
data.value: Track export generates multiple wav files based on the selected file name.

data.name: ExportAudioPopup.PathRequired
data.value: Please select an export path first.

data.name: Editor.BackConfirm.Message
data.value: There are unsaved changes in the current project.

data.name: ProjectEdit.KeySignature.Hint
data.value: Tap a note name to select

data.name: ProjectEdit.Toast.BeatsValidation
data.value: Beats must be an integer from 1 to 32

data.name: SingerSetup.Step1.Desc
data.value: Select a ZIP, RAR, UAR, or other archive file containing the singer data

data.name: SingerSetup.Step2.Desc
data.value: Select the correct encoding for text files. Preview content to verify display

data.name: SingerSetup.Step3.ManualDesc
data.value: Incomplete singer info detected. Please select the singer type manually

data.name: SingerSetup.Step3.AutoDesc
data.value: Singer info detected automatically. Confirm to continue

data.name: SingerSetup.Step3.TypeDiffSinger
data.value: • diffsinger: Uses DiffSinger AI synthesis engine

data.name: SingerSetup.Step4.Desc
data.value: Review installation info, then tap Install to proceed

data.name: SingerSetup.Success.Desc
data.value: Singer installed successfully. You can now use it in the editor

data.name: SingerManagement.VogenNotImplemented
data.value: Vogen singer setup wizard is not yet implemented, please install manually

data.name: ProjectEdit.BpmRange
data.value: BPM must be a value between 10 and 1000

data.name: SetupWizard.Step0.Desc
data.value: OpenUtau Mobile is a cross-platform singing synthesis editor supporting UTAU, DiffSinger, Vogen and more. Let's take a minute for basic setup so you can start creating.

data.name: SetupWizard.Step1.Desc
data.value: The following permissions help the app work properly. You can use limited features without granting them.

data.name: SetupWizard.Step1.Card.Storage.Desc
data.value: Used to read singer libraries and to open/save project files.

data.name: SetupWizard.Step1.DesktopReady
data.value: Your platform does not require additional permissions. File access is ready.

data.name: SetupWizard.Step2.Desc
data.value: Choose how to store your singer library. You can change this anytime in Settings.

data.name: SetupWizard.Step2.Builtin.Desc
data.value: Use the default singer directory bundled with the app. No additional configuration needed.

data.name: SetupWizard.Step2.External.Desc
data.value: Choose a custom folder to store and read singers. Ideal for users with existing UTAU voicebanks.

data.name: SetupWizard.Step3.Desc
data.value: You're ready to use OpenUtau Mobile!
